subcategory : "Cloud Project"
---

# ovh_cloud_instance_flavor

Retrieves information about a specific instance flavor in a public cloud project (APIv2).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_instance_flavor" "flavor" {
  service_name = "YYYY"
  region_name  = "GRA7"
  flavor_id    = "XXXX"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `service_name` (String) Service name
- `region_name` (String) Region name
- `flavor_id` (String) Flavor ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Flavor ID
- `name` (String) Flavor name
- `vcpus` (Number) Number of virtual CPUs
- `ram` (Number) RAM in MB
- `disk` (Number) Root disk size in GB
- `swap` (Number) Swap space in MB
- `ephemeral` (Number) Ephemeral disk size in GB
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the flavor is publicly available
- `description` (String) Flavor description
